## Summary

Describe the feature or improvement.

## Problem

What user or workflow problem does this solve?

## Proposed Direction

Describe the preferred behavior, UX, or architecture direction.

## Alternatives Considered

List any alternative approaches you evaluated.

## Additional Context

Add supporting details, examples, or references.
